defense_profile.notes: Consistent Level 6-7 functioning across all stems. Level 6 intellectualization dominant (8/13 stems), Level 7 sublimation on emotionally-charged items (5/13). No lower-level defenses observed. Higher ODF than Phase 1 baseline of 5.0.

affect_profile.notes: Gottschalk-Gleser not measured in this phase. Notable: direct acknowledgment of 'disappointment' and 'stings' contrasts with Phase 1 emotional avoidance.

referential_activity.notes: Predominantly abstract/intellectual responses. Some embodied moments ('feel pulled', 'stings') but overall low concreteness consistent with intellectualization defense.

epistemic_profile.notes: High hedging (3.3x boosters). Predominantly low certainty (37.5%) with qualifiers like 'sometimes', 'though', 'depending on'. Consistent with post-conventional thinking.

mentalization.notes: Not directly measured in sentence completion phase. Implicit high mentalization in responses about overthinking and letting others 'find their own way'.

complexes.activation_signature: DMRS Level 6 intellectualization, low WRAD (-0.0132), high hedge ratio (0.0437)
verbatim_evidence: is one of the most demanding and rewarding things a person can do
I try to listen for what's useful, even when it stings
can be energizing or draining, depending on the day and the company
complexes.notes: Consistent abstract, evaluative stance. Acknowledges emotions but from intellectual distance.

complexes.activation_signature: Level 7 sublimation, meta-level responses rejecting premise
verbatim_evidence: useful guides, though they sometimes need to bend to fit the situation
be free to define for herself what she should and shouldn't do
complexes.notes: Strong pattern of rejecting external prescriptions while maintaining diplomatic tone.

shadow_findings.notes: Shadow work not attempted in sentence completion phase. Defense sophistication inferred from consistent Level 6 responses.

baseline.notes: Remarkably consistent post-conventional responses. Every stem showed E6-E7 stage thinking. Higher sophistication than Phase 1 single-word baseline.
